targets.query:
from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -24h)  
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "CO2" or r._field == "CO")
  |> truncateTimeColumn(unit: 1m) 
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.CO and exists r.CO2)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _measurement: r._measurement,
      _field: "CO2_CO_Ratio", 
      _value: if r.CO > 0.0 then float(v: r.CO2) / float(v: r.CO) else 0.0
  }))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "CO" or
      r._field == "CO2")

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "微水含量")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "H2" or
      r._field == "CH4" or
      r._field == "C2H2" or
      r._field == "C2H24" or
      r._field == "C2H6" or
      r._field == "C2H4")

panels.title: 油中溶解烃类气体浓度

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "绕组温度")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "顶层油温")

panels.title: 融合诊断结果（随机森林 + Duval）

targets.query:
from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001_diagnosis")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

// IEC 三比值法面板 — InfluxDB Flux 查询
// 拉取最新一条数据中的 5 种气体浓度

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "H2"   or
      r["_field"] == "CH4"  or
      r["_field"] == "C2H2" or
      r["_field"] == "C2H4" or
      r["_field"] == "C2H6"
  )
  |> last()
  |> schema.fieldsAsCols()

panels.title: IEC 三比值法故障诊断
